title: ageratina cuicatlana
intro: Ageratina cuicatlana, also known as Cuicatlani, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is used as a medicinal herb. The plant is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. Ageratina cuicatlana has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
